results.title: Document attestation services suspended at MFA until further notice
results.description: All document attestation services at the Consular Affairs Division of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MFA) have been temporarily suspended until further notice due to an unexpected technical failure of the Electronic Document Attestation System (e-DAS), the Ministry said. The suspension applies to the Consular Affairs Division headquarters in Battaramulla as well as all Regional [...]

results.title: Bato Dela Rosa camp says he is not a fugitive from justice
results.description: Senator Ronald “Bato” Dela Rosa"s camp on Monday denied that he is a fugitive from justice after he left the premises of the Senate last week, saying the characterization is “baseless and unfair.”

results.title: Marcos appoints Kim Robert De Leon as new DBM secretary
